description: The Parisi-Palermiti clan is a criminal organization originating from Bari, Italy, with its stronghold in the Japigia neighborhood. Founded in the 1980s by Savino Parisi and Eugenio Palermiti, it controls drug trafficking, extortion, and other illegal activities. The clan has infiltrated businesses and local politics, and has been involved in conflicts with rival groups. Despite the imprisonment of its founder, the organization remains active under the leadership of Eugenio Palermiti.
